title: Were the Nazis, the Vatican and Mussolini all involved in early UFO crash retrievals? #ufo
summary: This interview segment discusses the alleged 1933 Magenta UFO crash in Italy and its subsequent custody chain involving Mussolini, the Nazis, the Vatican, and eventually the US through OSS channels. The discussion traces how Nazi scientists involved in exotic flight programs were brought to the US after WWII.

acronyms.definition: US intelligence agency that preceded the CIA and was allegedly involved in early UFO custody
US intelligence agency formed after the OSS

key_claims.claim: There was a UFO crash in Magenta, Lombardy, Italy
James Jesus Angleton was the OSS person involved in Italy at the time of the Magenta crash
Mussolini contacted Hitler to ask if the crashed craft belonged to the Nazis
Pope Pius XII and the Vatican were involved in back-channeling the crash materials through the OSS
The crashed material was eventually brought to the US and worked on at Wright Airfield
Hans Kammler, who was in charge of the blackest Nazi VFA programs, was brought to the US
Part of the rush to acquire Nazi scientists was to obtain those working on exotic flight principles and UFO technology
